context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements Python server-side real-time transcription using the ElevenLabs SDK, including correct async patterns, realtime model selection, event handling for partial vs committed transcripts, and proper connection management.

checklist.name: Correct Python import
checklist.description: Imports ElevenLabs from 'elevenlabs.client' (i.e., 'from elevenlabs.client import ElevenLabs')

checklist.name: Realtime connect method
checklist.description: Uses client.speech_to_text.realtime.connect() for the real-time streaming connection

checklist.name: Correct realtime model
checklist.description: Uses model_id='scribe_v2_realtime' (not 'scribe_v2' or other model names)

checklist.name: Async pattern
checklist.description: Uses async/await and asyncio for the real-time connection (async with or await on connect)

checklist.name: Partial transcript handling
checklist.description: Handles partial_transcript events (via event loop or callback registration with RealtimeEvents.PARTIAL_TRANSCRIPT or event.type == 'partial_transcript')

checklist.name: Committed transcript handling
checklist.description: Handles committed_transcript events (via event loop or callback registration with RealtimeEvents.COMMITTED_TRANSCRIPT or event.type == 'committed_transcript')

checklist.name: Error event handling
checklist.description: Handles error events (via RealtimeEvents.ERROR or event.type == 'error')

checklist.name: Stream URL usage
checklist.description: Passes a URL to the connection (via url parameter, stream_url method, or RealtimeUrlOptions)

checklist.name: Imports from elevenlabs
checklist.description: Imports at least one of RealtimeEvents, RealtimeUrlOptions, or RealtimeAudioOptions from the elevenlabs package

checklist.name: Graceful shutdown
checklist.description: Includes KeyboardInterrupt handling or signal handling for clean shutdown, and calls connection.close()
